name: FINAL FANTASY TYPE-0™ HD
descr: 关于此游戏Step into the fray as Class Zero, a group of students from an elite military academy whose country is attacked by an aggressive neighbouring Empire. In the brutal and harrowing struggle that follows, defeat the Empire and uncover the secrets behind the war using a range of powerful magical and combat abilities and an exciting new battle system.Key Features:Upgraded graphics resolution options for high end pc’sImproved in-game battle cameraFull controller supportFull STEAM achievements and trading cardsScalable motion blur settingsNew Character speed boostIncreased blood levels from the original PSP versionCustomizable dynamic screen shot mode
detail:
名称: FINAL FANTASY TYPE-0™ HD
类型: 动作, 角色扮演
开发者: Square Enix
发行商: Square Enix
系列: FINAL FANTASY
发行日期: 2015 年 8 月 18 日
sysreq:
Windows
最低配置:
操作系统 *: Windows 10 64 Bit, Windows 8.1 64 Bit, Windows 8 64 Bit, Windows 7 64 Bit Service Pack 1
处理器: CPU Core i3 2.5GHz
内存: 4 GB RAM
显卡: GTX560Ti or AMD Radeon 7790   mp4 [H.264]
DirectX 版本: 11
存储空间: 需要 30 GB 可用空间
推荐配置:
操作系统 *: Windows 10 64 Bit, Windows 8.1 64 Bit, Windows 8 64 Bit, Windows 7 64 Bit Service Pack 1
处理器: CPU Core i5 2.7GHz
内存: 6 GB RAM
显卡: GTX750   mp4 [H.264]
DirectX 版本: 11
存储空间: 需要 30 GB 可用空间
*
2024 年 1 月 1 日（PT）起，Steam 客户端将仅支持 Windows 10 及更新版本。
